site.name: Diiwaanka Bukaanka
site.description: A verified public archive documenting medication errors, misdiagnosis, and healthcare safety incidents in Somalia.

home.heroTitle: Documenting Patient Safety for Public Accountability
home.heroSubtitle: Diiwaanka Bukaanka is an investigative documentation archive. Reports are collected and verified offline by administrators — not submitted by the public.
home.missionText: To preserve verified records of healthcare incidents, support transparency, and enable searchable public access to documented patient safety cases.
home.searchPlaceholder: Type a name, hospital, medicine, or city…
home.searchHint: Type at least 2 letters, then press Search or pick a suggestion.
home.guideIntro: You do not need computer experience. Follow these simple steps.
home.step1Text: Enter a hospital name, patient name, doctor, medicine, city, or any word from a case.
home.step2Text: Tap the green Search button or choose a name from the list that appears.
home.step3Text: Click a card to read the full verified report.
home.browseSubtitle: Tap a topic below to see lists you can scroll.
home.browseSearchDesc: Look up any name or word in the archive
home.categoriesSubtitle: Tap a topic to see related cases.

search.title: Search the Archive
search.description: Find hospitals, patients, doctors, medicines, and verified case reports.
search.placeholder: Type a name, hospital, medicine, or city…
search.hint: Type at least 2 letters. Suggestions appear as you type.
search.startText: Use the box above. You can search by hospital name, patient name, doctor, medicine, or words from a report.
search.startTip1: You do not need an account.
search.startTip2: Optional filters on the left narrow results by hospital or date.
search.filtersHelp: Only use these if you already know the hospital or dates. Most people only need the search box.
search.noResults: No cases match your search criteria.

report.disclaimer: This report is part of a public documentation archive. Information is compiled from evidence reviewed by administrators. Publication does not constitute a legal determination of liability or wrongdoing.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Your message has been received. Administrators will review it.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: A verified public documentation archive. Only administrators verify reports.
footer.copyright: © {year} CodkaBukaanka. Documentation archive — not a legal determination.

errors.notFoundText: This page may have moved or does not exist. Return to the archive home.
errors.errorText: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.
